LAW AND MOTION 302, THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING - USAA INSURANCE COMPANY'S MOTION TO INTERVENE AS A PLAINTIFF IS GRANTED. PROPOSED INTERVENOR MEETS THE STANDARDS FOR MANDATORY INTERVENTION AND, EVEN IF IT DID NOT, THE COURT EXERCISES ITS DISCRETION TO GRANT PERMISSIVE INTERVENTION. JUDICIAL ECONOMY, IDENTITY OF THE ISSUES, AND THE LACK OF LEGAL PREJUDICE TO DEFENDANT ALL STRONGLY FAVOR INTERVENTION RATHER THAN A SEPARATE ACTION. (PREVAILING PARTY TO PREPARE A FORM OF ORDER.) Notice Of Motion And Motion To Intervene As A Plaintiff
Off Calendar Dec-05-2011 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling -
USAA INSURANCE COMPANY'S Motion To Intervene As A Plaintiff IS Granted. Proposed intervenor meets the standards for mandatory intervention and, even if it did not, the court exercises its discretion to grant permissive intervention. Judicial economy, identity of the issues, and the lack of legal prejudice to defendant all strongly favor intervention rather than a separate action. (Prevailing party to prepare a form of order.)
